esp32_can_init.message0: Initialize CAN bus Receive pin %1 Send pin %2 Mode %3 Baud rate %4

esp32_can_configure_alerts.message0: Configure CAN alarm %1 Receive data %2 Send idle %3 Send successfully %4 Send failed %5 Error passive %6 Bus error %7 The receiving queue is full %8
esp32_can_configure_alerts.tooltip: Configure CAN bus alarms that need to be monitored

esp32_can_send_message.message0: Send CAN message Identifier (ID) %1 Data length %2 Data %3
esp32_can_send_message.tooltip: Send CAN message, the data format is comma separated byte values

esp32_can_message_available.tooltip: Check if a CAN message is available

esp32_can_get_message_id.tooltip: Get the ID of the received CAN message

esp32_can_get_message_length.tooltip: Get the data length of the received CAN message

esp32_can_get_message_data.tooltip: Get the data bytes at the specified position of the received CAN message

esp32_can_transmit_interval.message0: Set CAN message sending interval %1 milliseconds
esp32_can_transmit_interval.tooltip: Set the interval for regularly sending CAN messages
